info.title: dotx - Execute .NET tools without installation
info.description: Execute .NET tools without installation - optimized for MCP servers. Automatically updates to latest version unless pinned.

options.name: --no-update
options.description: Skip checking for updates (pure offline mode)

options.name: --version
options.description:
Show version information
Cache Commands:
cache list              List all installed tools
cache show <id>         Show details for a specific tool
cache add <id>[@ver]    Download a tool to cache
cache update [<id>]     Update a tool (or all) to latest
cache remove <id>       Remove a specific tool
cache clear [-y]        Remove all tools
